visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a bright Costco warehouse. A young woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white ruffled blouse stands in front of a refrigerated freezer section. She holds a large, clear vacuum-sealed bag of Supreme Salmon, pointing at the label with a bright smile. (2) The scene shifts to a modern kitchen with white countertops. A pair of hands is shown carefully drying a thick salmon fillet with a white paper towel on a stainless steel wire rack. The lighting is focused and clear, highlighting the fresh texture of the fish. (3) The hands use a professional chef's knife to score the skin of the salmon in a criss-cross diamond pattern. The camera is at a top-down angle, providing an extreme close-up of the delicate cutting process. (4) A packet of creamy yellow sauce is squeezed over the salmon fillet. The background shows a clean kitchen environment with nested plates and scissors nearby. Yellow and white variety-style text overlays appear at the top. (5) In the final phase, the original girl is joined by another woman in a black beret. They are seated at a dining table with a plate of cooked salmon. They use forks to sample the fish, showing its flaky texture to the camera while smiling and gesturing enthusiastically. They hold up individual salmon portions in their original packaging to the lens.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 妹妹弄給我吃美威的. (2) [Slogan]: 鮭魚菲力. [Subtitle]: 鮭魚菲力三種組合1299元. (3) [Subtitle]: 哈哈 裡面總共6片. (4) [Subtitle]: 所以每一份216塊. (5) [Subtitle]: 重點要有個會料理的妹妹. (6) [Subtitle]: 你才能吃到熟的鮭魚. (7) [Subtitle]: 不 你錯了 這個. (8) [Subtitle]: 氣炸鍋就可以用了. (9) [Subtitle]: 啊 真的嗎 那我不需要你囉. (10) [Subtitle]: 他味道感覺很棒哎. (11) [Subtitle]: 就是有羅勒 然後香蒜跟法式檸檬. (12) [Subtitle]: 我很期待檸檬以及. (13) [Subtitle]: 美威是那個 有些百貨公司裡面. (14) [Subtitle]: 有餐廳它很貴. (15) [Subtitle]: 但是它變成袋子裡面的食物 沒有很貴. (16) [Subtitle]: 有我們之前有去吃過. (17) [Subtitle]: 還不錯重點是. (18) [Subtitle]: 是不是每一個 都給你菲力的部位呢. (19) [Subtitle]: 好期待哦. (20) [Variety]: 料理時間. [Subtitle]: 先把鮭魚上面的水分擦一擦. (21) [Subtitle]: 這是解凍之後. (22) [Subtitle]: 在上面輕輕畫個井字紋. (23) [Subtitle]: 奶油檸檬醬. (24) [Subtitle]: 它這個是要先醃. (25) [Subtitle]: 然後放到冷藏 15分鐘再拿去料理. (26) [Slogan]: 家庭主婦的好幫手. [Subtitle]: 家庭主婦的好幫手. (27) [Subtitle]: 美味輕鬆料理系列的鮭魚. (28) [Subtitle]: 我必須說它個鮭魚. (29) [Subtitle]: 好漂亮啊 你們看. (30) [Subtitle]: 這個料理完的橫剖面. (31) [Subtitle]: 它的肉非常地緊實. (32) [Subtitle]: 我們看魚皮一撥就整塊下來. (33) [Subtitle]: 代表很新鮮 然後它也沒有刺. (34) [Subtitle]: 它是說先抹醬然後再料理. (35) [Subtitle]: 可是我們個人都認為他的醬 可以另外蘸. (36) [Subtitle]: 然後它的鮭魚肉 是真的給的很漂亮. (37) [Variety]: 肉也緊實又香. [Subtitle]: 肉也緊實又香. (38) [Subtitle]: 這樣子一份肉配一個醬包是216元. (39) [Subtitle]: 你覺得值得嗎 留言告訴我們哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appearing both individually and together.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black and white floral bucket hat and a white ruffled top; the other wears a black beret and a black sheer blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco freezer aisle with commercial shelving; a residential kitchen with a white island counter and stacked dishes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a bright 'Whoosh' SFX and a high-tempo, major-key electronic pop track. A female voice speaks with high energy and rapid delivery, articulating clearly. (2) A sharp 'Ding' SFX triggers as the unit price is highlighted. The narrator's pitch remains high and engaging. (3) Subtle metallic clinking sounds occur during the kitchen transition, accompanied by a soft rustle of paper. The background music remains continuous and upbeat. (4) A percussive 'Pop' sound effect marks a text overlay. The sound of liquid pouring or a sauce packet being squeezed is briefly audible over the music. (5) Multiple female voices interact with high vocal arousal and positive valence, expressing joy and approval. The track concludes with a slight volume swell of the BGM synth pads.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Product Discovery -> Preparation Demo -> Tasting Session -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a commercial review for the Supreme Salmon product sold at Costco. It aims to persuade viewers of the product's value and ease of preparation by demonstrating a simple cooking process and providing a positive taste review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of brand packaging, verbal praise for the product's freshness and taste, and clear instruction on how to cook it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-frequency editing style typical of viral social media content, effectively combining instructional cooking segments with a lifestyle-vlog aesthetic.
